rows.label: tev000295_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, my dear friend [ST:playername ]. We suspected
this might pick your curiosity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0002
rows.name:
After all, how could anyone
possibly fail to notice such
a splendid exercise routine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev000295_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what exercises Lu is doing.

rows.label: tev000295_JNK0020
rows.name: Implore

rows.label: tev000295_SEL0021
rows.name: Insist that Lu teach you his exercise routine.

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0003
rows.name: A perfectly reasonable question![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0004
rows.name:
This is a hybrid exercise program of our own creation.
Its foundation is a daily Japanese calisthenics routine,
which Secretary Nagi has kindly taught to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0005
rows.name:
But we have also incorporated elements of
Nopon gymnastics, as well as movements
taken from the Bias coming-of-age dance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0006
rows.name:
And what was the genesis
of this inspired mélange?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0007
rows.name:
Merely that NLA is a city of many species
living together, and yet there is no
common exercise routine to unite us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0008
rows.name:
We're confident that you, of all people, will
appreciate the initiative we took in finding
a solution to this most vexing of problems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0009
rows.name:
We never cease to be amazed by your
ability to intuitively grasp the
truths that lesser minds resist, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0010
rows.name: Truly, you are no average human.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0011
rows.name:
This is a hybrid exercise program of our own creation.
Its foundation is a daily Japanese calisthenics routine,
which Secretary Nagi has kindly taught to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0012
rows.name:
But we have also incorporated elements of
Nopon gymnastics, as well as movements
taken from the Bias coming-of-age dance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0013
rows.name:
And what was the genesis
of this inspired mélange?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0014
rows.name:
Merely that NLA is a city of many species
living together, and yet there is no
common exercise routine to unite us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0015
rows.name:
We saw the void and took it upon ourself
to fill it. We have never been one to
resist destiny's trumpet, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0016
rows.name:
It would please us to no end
to have your endorsement.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_JNK0030
rows.name: Endorse

rows.label: tev000295_SEL0031
rows.name: Commend Lu for his impressive exercise routine.

rows.label: tev000295_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000295_SEL0041
rows.name: Shame Lu for his embarrassing exercise routine.

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0017
rows.name:
You honor us, my friend.
This is high praise indeed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0018
rows.name:
It was too much to hope that all the
xenoforms of NLA would line up to join us
as soon as they witnessed our bold display.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0019
rows.name:
But now that we have a partner of such
lofty stature, all will be well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0020
rows.name:
We are confident that our combined
efforts of public outreach will win
over the city twice as quickly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0021
rows.name:
Slow and steady may win the race, but
two turtles are faster than one![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0022
rows.name: Wha... What?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0023
rows.name:
We had taken you for a visionary!
We never imagined that you would
react exactly as Secretary Nagi did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0024
rows.name:
This is most unfortunate. It is clear you are
intrigued and fascinated by our routine, yet
still you fear to attempt it yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0025
rows.name:
Heed our words, friend—you are
gazing upon the future of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0026
rows.name:
Within a year, the majority of NLA's
population, xenoforms included, will be
joining us in our morning calisthenics program.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000295_MSG0027
rows.name:
We hope your rash words of today will not stop
you from admitting your error in the future.
There will always be a spot for you beside us![ST:wait ]
